zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward De Gresham Knight於1312年出生在英國諾福爾可艾爾莫頓時，他的父親Sir Roger Branche De Gresham Knight22歲，母親Lady De gresham42歲。他於1336年與Lady Margaret Gresham在英國英格蘭諾福爾可霍爾特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1377年在英國諾福爾可享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward De Gresham Knight于1312年出生在英国諾福爾可艾爾莫頓时，他的父亲Sir Roger Branche De Gresham Knight22岁，母亲Lady De gresham42岁。他于1336年与Lady Margaret Gresham在英国英格兰諾福爾可霍爾特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1377年在英国諾福爾可享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gresham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): habitational name from a place in Norfolk, so named from Old English græs, gærs ‘grass(land), pasturage’ + hām ‘homestead’ or hamm ‘enclosure hemmed in by water’.

variants.name: Grisham
meanings: English: variant of   Gresham  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward De Gresham Knight was born in 1312, in Aylmerton, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Roger Branche De Gresham Knight, was 22 and his mother, Lady De gresham, was 42. He married Lady Margaret Gresham in 1336, in Holt, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1377, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 65.

Il a épousé Lady Margaret Gresham en 1336, à Holt, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1377, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward De Gresham Knightが1312年にイギリスノーフォルクエイルマートンで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Branche De Gresham Knightは22歳，母Lady De greshamは42歳であった。1336年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホルトでLady Margaret Greshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1377年にイギリスノーフォルクで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward De Gresham Knight(이)가 1312년 영국 노르폴크 아이머턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Branche De Gresham Knight(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady De gresham(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 홀트에서 Lady Margaret Gresham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1377년 영국 노르폴크에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward De Gresham Knight родился в 1312 г. в местности аилмиртон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Branche De Gresham Knight было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady De gresham, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Gresham в 1336 г. в местности холт, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1377 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.
